title: INTERACT
desc: An all-in-one hackathon platform where students discover events and organizers manage registrations in one simple place.

title: GetItDone
desc: An anonymous freelancing platform where clients hire agents using skill categories and escrow based payments.

title: Studique
desc: A campus community platform used by over 15000 SRM students for resources events discussions and campus updates.

title: SRM GPA
desc: A simple academic toolkit that helps SRM students calculate SGPA track CGPA and predict their grades.

title: IRCTC Redesign
desc: A complete UI redesign of the IRCTC booking site focused on easier and more accessible ticket booking.

title: Morph
desc: A fintech style interface where users upload images to generate clean morph based face designs.

title: SRMConnect
desc: A database management system for SRM clubs to manage members records and internal operations.

title: InstaMG & Bluepicks
desc: Designed product stickers and Play Store screenshots focused on clean visuals and app presentation.

title: Social Media
desc: Instagram stories posters and creatives designed for GitHub Community SRM and Studique.
